prompt: Create a square 1970s instant Polaroid photograph with a thick off-white border and slightly rounded blackened edges, showing exactly 2 young adult friends standing in front of a sun-faded turquoise vintage Chevrolet pickup truck at a Route 66 roadside gas station in the American Southwest. The left friend leans casually against the driver-side front area wearing a blue denim jacket, light button-down shirt, faded jeans, and a belt; the right friend leans on the hood wearing a dark vintage rock band T-shirt, faded jeans, and a belt. Both have shoulder-length wavy brown hair and relaxed road-trip body language, with softly blurred faces like an old snapshot. Behind them is a low gas station building with a corrugated roof, old fuel pumps, a visible Route 66 shield sign above the canopy, dusty desert hills and washed-out sky in the distance. Use sun-bleached warm cyan-and-yellow color grading, heavy vintage film grain, slight lens softness, faded contrast, dust specks, tiny scratches, uneven exposure, and a strong yellow-orange light leak blooming from the upper left. Add handwritten blue ink text centered on the bottom Polaroid border reading Summer 76. Make it feel like an authentic found 1976 vacation photo shot on instant film, nostalgic, imperfect, candid, and weathered.
